mapper.select: SELECT cm.*, CASE WHEN cm.send_id = 0 THEN 'https://img2.baidu.com/it/u=2473380155,1807338550&fm=253&fmt=auto&app=138&f=JPEG?w=500&h=500' ELSE cu.avatar END as chat_avatar, CASE WHEN cm.send_id = 0 THEN 'AI聊天' ELSE cu.real_name END as real_name, cf.original_name as file_name, cf.file_size, cf.file_type FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN chat_user cu ON cm.send_id = cu.id and cu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN chat_file cf ON cm.file_id = cf.id and cf.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cm.chat_id = #{chatId} and cm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm.create_time desc
